publishedAbstract: This guide provides details regarding the following OpenShift Data Foundation subscription-related topics:- Where OpenShift Data Foundation can be deployed- How OpenShift Data Foundation can be deployed- Available OpenShift Data Foundation Editions- How OpenShift Data Foundation subscriptions are counted- OpenShift Data Foundation Add-on for Red Hat Ceph Storage- Support level of subscriptions- Disaster Recovery deployments and subscription coverage- Migration and swing upgrades
